description:
Recto: part of a page containing formulae for begging letters. 

Verso: part of an unrelated letter in Judaeo-Arabic, reporting about a circumcision ceremony. The sender seems to say that he provided an extended liturgy, including a 'silluq' by Rabbenu Ghiyyat, but his enemies only increased their objection to him. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's attached notes.)
description_he: פנים: חלק מעמוד המכיל נוסחאות למכתבי בקשה. גב: חלק ממכתב לא קשור ביהודית-ערבית, המדווח על טקס ברית מילה
